summary: Iteration 89 - Complete testing of Xplan Integration feature. All backend APIs (14 tests) passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all 4 tabs, configure dialog, and sync operations working correctly. Demo mode uses MOCKED Xplan API data.

issues: Compliance modal appears on initial page load - requires checkbox acknowledgment

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: /api/xplan/clients returns synced clients (4 demo clients)
PASS: /api/xplan/client/{client_id} returns detailed client data with portfolios, assets, goals
PASS: XplanIntegration.jsx loads with all 4 tabs (Overview, Synced Clients, Sync & Push, History)
PASS: Configure button (data-testid='configure-xplan-btn') opens configuration dialog
PASS: Full Sync button (data-testid='full-sync-btn') triggers sync operation
PASS: Xplan navigation exists under Integrations group in Adviser Mode sidebar
PASS: Form inputs have proper data-testid attributes (xplan-site-url-input, xplan-username-input, xplan-password-input)
seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates 4 sample Australian financial advisor clients with portfolios, assets, liabilities, and goals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Xplan Integration feature fully tested in iteration 89. Demo mode is enabled and working. 4 demo clients synced with full data (James Wheeler, Sarah Wheeler, Michael Chen, Emma Thompson). All CRUD operations working. Push operations (strategy, document, note) work in demo mode (MOCKED). To access: Navigate to /xplan-integration or use Adviser Mode > Integrations > Xplan.

mocked_apis_list: Xplan API - Demo mode uses XplanAPIClient._get_demo_* methods instead of real IRESS Xplan connection
Demo data includes: 4 Australian clients, superannuation/investment/SMSF portfolios, property assets, liabilities, retirement/education/travel goals
